narration: We start with an empty array. The end of the array will act like the stack top.
callout: An empty stack has no top item yet.

narration: After pushing 3 and then 8, the end of the array holds the top value 8.
decision: Push adds to the array end.

narration: Peek sees 8, and pop removes 8, leaving 3 on top.
callout: Pop removes the most recent value.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why is the array end a better stack top than the front?
reflectionPrompt.placeholder: The array end is better because...
